title: LessHurtParticle
description: When a player causes "million" damage, the number of particle effects is no longer determined by the amount of damage caused, but by the percentage of damage caused to the maximum health, resulting in 1-5 particle effects.
body: When a player causes "million" damage, the number of particle effects is no longer determined by the amount of damage caused, but by the percentage of damage caused to the maximum health, resulting in 1-5 particle effects.
